input.command: kubectl -n mongodb get pods -o wide; echo "---sts---"; kubectl -n mongodb get statefulset mongodb-replica -o yaml

content.content:
NAME                READY   STATUS    RESTARTS   AGE   IP            NODE                    NOMINATED NODE   READINESS GATES
mongodb-replica-0   1/1     Running   0          28s   10.244.0.40   karma-7-control-plane   <none>           <none>
mongodb-replica-1   0/1     Pending   0          3s    <none>        karma-7-control-plane   <none>           <none>
---sts---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: StatefulSet
metadata:
  annotations:
    kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
      {"apiVersion":"apps/v1","kind":"StatefulSet","metadata":{"annotations":{},"name":"mongodb-replica","namespace":"mongodb"},"spec":{"replicas":3,"selector":{"matchLabels":{"app":"mongodb-replica"}},"serviceName":"mongodb-replica-svc","template":{"metadata":{"labels":{"app":"mongodb-replica"}},"spec":{"containers":[{"command":["mongod","--replSet","mongodb-replica","--bind_ip_all","--auth","--keyFile=/etc/mongo-keyfile/keyfile"],"image":"mongo:6.0.5","name":"mongod","ports":[{"containerPort":27017,"name":"mongodb","protocol":"TCP"}],"resources":{"limits":{"cpu":"1","memory":"1Gi"},"requests":{"cpu":"0.5","memory":"512Mi"}},"volumeMounts":[{"mountPath":"/data/db","name":"data-volume"},{"mountPath":"/etc/mongo-keyfile","name":"mongo-keyfile","readOnly":true}]}],"securityContext":{"runAsGroup":0,"runAsUser":0},"volumes":[{"name":"mongo-keyfile","secret":{"defaultMode":256,"secretName":"mongo-keyfile"}}]}},"volumeClaimTemplates":[{"metadata":{"name":"data-volume"},"spec":{"accessModes":["ReadWriteOnce"],"resources":{"requests":{"storage":"10Gi"}}}}]}}
  creationTimestamp: "2026-07-10T00:01:56Z"
  generation: 2
  name: mongodb-replica
  namespace: mongodb
  resourceVersion: "6213"
  uid: a2b3ab1f-d416-4cc1-86bd-2fba8b65bcaa
spec:
  persistentVolumeClaimRetentionPolicy:
    whenDeleted: Retain
    whenScaled: Retain
  podManagementPolicy: OrderedReady
  replicas: 5
  revisionHistoryLimit: 10
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: mongodb-replica
  serviceName: mongodb-replica-svc
  template:
    metadata:
      creationTimestamp: null
      labels:
        app: mongodb-replica
    spec:
      containers:
      - command:
        - mongod
        - --replSet
        - mongodb-replica
        - --bind_ip_all
        - --auth
        - --keyFile=/etc/mongo-keyfile/keyfile
        image: mongo:6.0.5
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        name: mongod
        ports:
        - containerPort: 27017
          name: mongodb
          protocol: TCP
        resources:
          limits:
            cpu: "1"
            memory: 1Gi
          requests:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 512Mi
        terminationMessagePath: /dev/termination-log
        terminationMessagePolicy: File
        volumeMounts:
        - mountPath: /data/db
          name: data-volume
        - mountPath: /etc/mongo-keyfile
          name: mongo-keyfile
          readOnly: true
      dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
      restartPolicy: Always
      schedulerName: default-scheduler
      securityContext:
        runAsGroup: 0
        runAsUser: 0
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
      volumes:
      - name: mongo-keyfile
        secret:
          defaultMode: 256
          secretName: mongo-keyfile
  updateStrategy:
    rollingUpdate:
      partition: 0
    type: RollingUpdate
  volumeClaimTemplates:
  - apiVersion: v1
    kind: PersistentVolumeClaim
    metadata:
      creationTimestamp: null
      name: data-volume
    spec:
      accessModes:
      - ReadWriteOnce
      resources:
        requests:
          storage: 10Gi
      volumeMode: Filesystem
    status:
      phase: Pending
status:
  availableReplicas: 1
  collisionCount: 0
  currentReplicas: 2
  currentRevision: mongodb-replica-77f75f4f95
  observedGeneration: 2
  readyReplicas: 1
  replicas: 2
  updateRevision: mongodb-replica-77f75f4f95
  updatedReplicas: 2

input.command:
kubectl -n mongodb get statefulset mongodb-replica -o jsonpath='{.spec.replicas}{"\n"}'
echo "--- pods now ---"
kubectl -n mongodb get pods -o wide
echo "--- pod0 full spec (probes) ---"
kubectl -n mongodb get pod mongodb-replica-0 -o yaml | grep -A15 "livenessProbe\|readinessProbe\|startupProbe"

input.command:
kubectl -n mongodb get pods -o wide
echo "---restart counts & probe check for all pods---"
for p in mongodb-replica-0 mongodb-replica-1 mongodb-replica-2 mongodb-replica-3 mongodb-replica-4; do
  echo "== $p =="
  kubectl -n mongodb get pod $p -o jsonpath='{.status.containerStatuses[0].restartCount}{"\n"}' 2>/dev/null
  kubectl -n mongodb get pod $p -o yaml 2>/dev/null | grep -E "livenessProbe|readinessProbe|startupProbe" 
done
echo "---controllerrevisions---"
kubectl -n mongodb get controllerrevisions

content.text: The cluster currently has 5 members (carried over from the earlier scaling stage), but this task's target state is a 3-member set (1 PRIMARY + 2 SECONDARY) with properly tuned probes. I'll gracefully remove the two extra members, scale down, and add auth-aware probes.

kubectl -n mongodb exec mongodb-replica-0 -- mongosh --quiet -u "admin-user" -p 'admin123password' --authenticationDatabase admin --eval '
rs.remove("mongodb-replica-3.mongodb-replica-svc.mongodb.svc.cluster.local:27017");
'

content.text: Now down to 3 pods. Let's confirm the replica set state, then add the auth-aware liveness/readiness probes.

input.command: kubectl -n mongodb exec mongodb-replica-0 -- mongosh --quiet -u "admin-user" -p 'admin123password' --authenticationDatabase admin --eval "rs.status().members.map(m=>({id:m._id,name:m.name,state:m.stateStr}))"

cat <<'EOF' > /tmp/probe-patch.yaml
spec:
  template:
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: mongod
        env:
        - name: MONGO_USER
          value: "admin-user"
        - name: MONGO_PASSWORD
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: admin-user-password
              key: password
        readinessProbe:
          exec:
            command:
            - /bin/sh
            - -c
            - mongosh --quiet --host 127.0.0.1 -u "$MONGO_USER" -p "$MONGO_PASSWORD" --authenticationDatabase admin --eval "db.adminCommand({ping:1})"
          initialDelaySeconds: 20
          periodSeconds: 10
          timeoutSeconds: 5
          failureThreshold: 6
          successThreshold: 1
        livenessProbe:
          exec:
            command:
            - /bin/sh
            - -c
            - mongosh --quiet --host 127.0.0.1 -u "$MONGO_USER" -p "$MONGO_PASSWORD" --authenticationDatabase admin --eval "db.adminCommand({ping:1})"
          initialDelaySeconds: 40
          periodSeconds: 20
          timeoutSeconds: 10
          failureThreshold: 6
          successThreshold: 1
EOF
kubectl -n mongodb patch statefulset mongodb-replica --patch-file /tmp/probe-patch.yaml
kubectl -n mongodb rollout status statefulset mongodb-replica --timeout=240s

description: kubectl -n mongodb rollout status statefulset mongodb-replica --timeout=240s
